title: Rainbow Signal Envelope
description: Contract snapshot for the trading-hub Rainbow Signal Envelope. Derived from ai4trade-bot Issue #51 (CanonicalSignalEnvelope). This is a local copy — the upstream source of truth is the ai4trade-bot repository.

schema_version.description: Envelope schema version. Current version: 1. Must be >= 1.

event_type.description: Type of event. Determines how the envelope is classified.

strategy_id.description: Strategy identifier that produced the signal.

model_id.description: Optional model identifier (e.g. 'claude-sonnet-4'). Null when not applicable.

symbol.description: Trading pair symbol. Must be a non-empty string. Use '*' for system-wide events.

timeframe.description: Candle timeframe if applicable (e.g. '1h', '15m'). Null for non-candle signals.

timestamp_utc.description: ISO-8601 UTC timestamp of signal generation. Must be parseable by datetime.fromisoformat().

emitted_at_utc.description: ISO-8601 UTC timestamp when the envelope was emitted. May differ from timestamp_utc.

direction.description: Signal direction. Uses trading-hub canonical values. Accepts both Rainbow (bullish/bearish/neutral) and trading-hub (long/short/flat) conventions — normalized to trading-hub values.

signal_strength.description: Optional signal strength. Range: 0.0–1.0. Null when not applicable.

metadata.description: Arbitrary metadata container. May include reason_codes, data_quality, features, raw_refs, and other signal-specific fields.

freshness_seconds.description: Age of the source data in seconds.

features.description: Arbitrary feature map for model/analysis metadata.

raw_refs.description: References to raw input data that produced this signal.

redaction_status.description: Redaction status of the envelope. Indicates whether sensitive data has been redacted.

then.description: Signal events must have a non-empty symbol.
